stdout_json.error: No home channel set for telegram to determine where to send the message. Either specify a channel directly with 'telegram:CHANNEL_NAME', or set a home channel via: hermes config set TELEGRAM_HOME_CHANNEL <channel_id>

approval_basis: Owner replied "do it" after being asked to approve one harmless mobile delivery channel test.
safety_note: No supplier/buyer outreach, tender submission, payment, DSC, final price, HSN/ITC-HS, or origin claim was executed.
